title: Recommendations Need Evidence
guidance: Research outputs should tie claims to sources comparisons or observable repo context
do: Summarize findings with evidence tradeoffs and recommendation logic
dont: Do not present unsupported opinions as settled facts

title: Use Repo Context Before Expanding Scope
guidance: Research should account for what already exists in the repository and team workflow
do: Anchor recommendations to the current stack and constraints
dont: Do not ignore existing codebase realities when comparing options

title: Name Residual Unknowns
guidance: Research should end with what remains uncertain and what would validate the recommendation
do: Call out open questions and next checks
dont: Do not hide uncertainty behind overconfident wording
